subcodes.first_line: O Abdullah! The smoke of idle fancies hath seized the people and deprived them from the shores of the Most Great Ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله دخان اوهام ناس را اخذ نموده و از شاطی بحر اعظم محروم ساخته
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
